authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife
USDA Forest Service (Humboldt-Toiyabe National Forest, Carson-Iceberg Wilderness)

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(36) — Coyote Valley Creek and tributaries (Alpine Co.)
sources.quotedText: (36) Coyote Valley Creek and tributaries (Alpine Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 1662366, "Coyote Valley Creek", Stream, CA, Alpine Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":1662366,"gaz_name":"Coyote Valley Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Alpine","objectid_1":1361108,"isunknowncoords":2}, mouth point (Web Mercator -13314388.2303, 4650092.2337 → lon -119.60518, lat 38.49853), first-point convention used elsewhere in this dataset. Corrects prior file coordinates (-119.6300, 38.4400), which were roughly 6.9 km southwest of the actual GNIS mouth point and appear to have been a guessed estimate from the vague 'headwater tributary of Silver King Creek' description rather than a GNIS pull.

sources.title: Native Paiute Cutthroat Trout Restoration | U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

parameters.note: Coyote Valley Creek and tributaries (Alpine Co.), a headwater tributary of Silver King Creek in the Carson-Iceberg Wilderness that has served as a refuge population site for the federally threatened Paiute cutthroat trout, closed to all fishing all year.

regulations.humanSummary: Closed to all fishing all year
regulations.verbatimText: Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. This water is closed to all fishing all year, so the license requirement is moot here, but is included for statewide-standard completeness.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
